languages.text: Люди озирались, готовясь к новой напасти, когда стены вокруг замерцали. Их очертания текли и менялись, формируя вокруг нас сияющие изгибы. Многие читали молитвы, в надежде изгнать вязкий страх, заполняющий разум при виде этой странной фантасмагории неживого свечения.

traits.locale_text:
Оставшиеся в живых напряженно озирались, ожидая, что собратья создания, привлеченные звуком сражения, явятся вслед за ним.
Вместо этого произошло нечто иное.
Стены вокруг, своды коридора замерцали изнутри. Их очертания текли и менялись, формируя вокруг нас сияющие изгибы. Когда трансформация закончилась, группа стояла среди небольшого полукруглого зала.

languages.text: Everyone was looking about, bracing themselves for a fresh attack, when the walls around them shimmered. Their contours flowed and shifted, forming shining curves around us. Many of the squad recited prayers, hoping to banish the visceral terror that gripped their minds at the sight of this strange phantasmagoria of lifeless light.
languages.original_text: Люди озирались, готовясь к новой напасти, когда стены вокруг замерцали. Их очертания текли и менялись, формируя вокруг нас сияющие изгибы. Многие читали молитвы, в надежде изгнать вязкий страх, заполняющий разум при виде этой странной фантасмагории неживого свечения.

traits.locale_text: Everyone looked about, bracing themselves for a fresh attack, when the walls around them shimmered. Their contours flowed and changed, forming shining curves around us. Many of the squad recited prayers, hoping to banish the visceral terror that gripped their minds at the sight of this strange phantasmagoria of lifeless light.

Everyone was looking about, bracing themselves for a fresh attack, when the walls around them shimmered. Their contours flowed and shifted, forming shining curves around us. Many of the squad recited prayers, hoping to banish the visceral terror that gripped their minds at the sight of this strange phantasmagoria of lifeless light.

The walls around us shimmered, and the people looked about, preparing for a fresh attack. The walls' contours flowed and changed, forming shining curves around us. The patterns on the walls were floating, forming into incomprehensible symbols or unknown faces. Many of the squad recited prayers, hoping to banish the visceral terror that gripped their minds at the sight of this strange phantasmagoria of light.

Everyone looked about, bracing themselves for a fresh attack, when the walls around them shimmered. Their contours flowed and changed, forming shining curves around us. Many of the squad recited prayers, hoping to banish the visceral terror that gripped their minds at the sight of this strange phantasmagoria of lifeless light.

Everyone was looking about, bracing themselves for a fresh attack, when the walls around them shimmered. Their contours flowed and shifted, forming shining curves around us. Many of the squad recited prayers, hoping to banish the visceral terror that gripped their minds at the sight of this strange phantasmagoria of lifeless light.

languages.text: 众人四下张望，准备迎接新的袭击。就在这时，周围的墙壁闪烁起来，墙体的轮廓不断流变，在我们周围形成发光的诡异圆弧。小队中不少人开始念诵祈祷文，试图驱散这片死光幻景所带来的本能恐惧。
languages.original_text: Everyone was looking about, bracing themselves for a fresh attack, when the walls around them shimmered. Their contours flowed and shifted, forming shining curves around us. Many of the squad recited prayers, hoping to banish the visceral terror that gripped their minds at the sight of this strange phantasmagoria of lifeless light.

traits.locale_text: 众人四下张望，准备迎接新的袭击。就在这时，周围的墙壁闪烁起来，墙体的轮廓不断流变，在我们周围形成发光的诡异圆弧。小队中不少人开始念诵祈祷文，试图驱散这片死光幻景所带来的本能恐惧。

languages.text: Todo el mundo miraba en derredor, preparándonos para un nuevo ataque, cuando las paredes brillaron a nuestro alrededor. Sus contornos fluyeron y cambiaron, formando curvas brillantes que nos rodeaban. Gran parte de la unidad empezó a recitar plegarias, buscando desterrar el terror que esta extra luz inerte despertaba en sus mentes.
languages.original_text: Everyone was looking about, bracing themselves for a fresh attack, when the walls around them shimmered. Their contours flowed and shifted, forming shining curves around us. Many of the squad recited prayers, hoping to banish the visceral terror that gripped their minds at the sight of this strange phantasmagoria of lifeless light.

traits.locale_text: Todo el mundo miraba en derredor, preparándonos para un nuevo ataque, cuando las paredes brillaron a nuestro alrededor. Sus contornos fluyeron y cambiaron, formando curvas brillantes que nos rodeaban. Gran parte de la unidad empezó a recitar plegarias, buscando desterrar el terror que esta extra luz inerte despertaba en sus mentes.

languages.text: Tous jetaient des coups d'œil inquiets aux alentours, prêts à essuyer une nouvelle attaque, lorsque les murs se mirent à briller. Les contours des parois changèrent peu à peu, formant des courbes brillantes autour de nous. La plupart des membres de l'escouade se tournèrent vers la prière, espérant ainsi repousser la terreur viscérale qui s'invitait dans leur esprit à la vue de cette étrange fantasmagorie de lumière sans vie.
languages.original_text: Everyone was looking about, bracing themselves for a fresh attack, when the walls around them shimmered. Their contours flowed and shifted, forming shining curves around us. Many of the squad recited prayers, hoping to banish the visceral terror that gripped their minds at the sight of this strange phantasmagoria of lifeless light.

traits.locale_text: Tous jetaient des coups d'œil inquiets aux alentours, prêts à essuyer une nouvelle attaque, lorsque les murs se mirent à briller. Les contours des parois changèrent peu à peu, formant des courbes brillantes autour de nous. La plupart des membres de l'escouade se tournèrent vers la prière, espérant ainsi repousser la terreur viscérale qui s'invitait dans leur esprit à la vue de cette étrange fantasmagorie de lumière sans vie.

languages.text: Herkes, etrafındaki duvarlar parıldarken yeni bir saldırıya hazırlıklı olmak için etrafına bakınıyordu. Konturları akıp şekil değiştirdi ve etrafımızda parlayan eğriler oluşturdu. Manganın çoğu, bu tuhaf ve ışıklı hayal oyunu karşısında zihinlerini saran o ilkel dehşeti kovmak umuduyla dualar okudu.
languages.original_text: Everyone was looking about, bracing themselves for a fresh attack, when the walls around them shimmered. Their contours flowed and shifted, forming shining curves around us. Many of the squad recited prayers, hoping to banish the visceral terror that gripped their minds at the sight of this strange phantasmagoria of lifeless light.

traits.locale_text: Herkes, etrafındaki duvarlar parıldarken yeni bir saldırıya hazırlıklı olmak için etrafına bakınıyordu. Konturları akıp şekil değiştirdi ve etrafımızda parlayan eğriler oluşturdu. Manganın çoğu, bu tuhaf ve ışıklı hayal oyunu karşısında zihinlerini saran o ilkel dehşeti kovmak umuduyla dualar okudu.

languages.text: Alle sahen sich um und wappneten sich für einen neuerlichen Angriff, als die Wände um uns herum zu schimmern begannen. Ihre Konturen verschwommen und bildeten leuchtende Kurven um uns herum. Viele Truppmitglieder beteten und hofften, den tief sitzenden Schrecken zu verbannen, der beim Anblick dieser seltsamen Phantasmagorie aus leblosem Licht von ihrem Geist Besitz ergriffen hatte.
languages.original_text: Everyone was looking about, bracing themselves for a fresh attack, when the walls around them shimmered. Their contours flowed and shifted, forming shining curves around us. Many of the squad recited prayers, hoping to banish the visceral terror that gripped their minds at the sight of this strange phantasmagoria of lifeless light.

traits.locale_text: Alle sahen sich um und wappneten sich für einen neuerlichen Angriff, als die Wände um uns herum zu schimmern begannen. Ihre Konturen verschwommen und bildeten leuchtende Kurven um uns herum. Viele Truppmitglieder beteten und hofften, den tief sitzenden Schrecken zu verbannen, der beim Anblick dieser seltsamen Phantasmagorie aus leblosem Licht von ihrem Geist Besitz ergriffen hatte.

languages.text: 周囲の壁は光り輝き、人々は警戒し、新たな攻撃に備えた。壁の輪郭は流れ、変化し、我々を取り囲む光る曲線となった。壁の模様は浮遊し、理解不能な記号や未知の顔へと変化した。隊員たちは多くが祈りを捧げ、この奇妙な光る幻影に心を奪われた恐怖を払いのけることを願った。
languages.original_text: The walls around us shimmered, and the people looked about, preparing for a fresh attack. The walls' contours flowed and changed, forming shining curves around us. The patterns on the walls were floating, forming into incomprehensible symbols or unknown faces. Many of the squad recited prayers, hoping to banish the visceral terror that gripped their minds at the sight of this strange phantasmagoria of light.

traits.locale_text: 周囲の壁は光り輝き、人々は警戒し、新たな攻撃に備えた。壁の輪郭は流れ、変化し、我々を取り囲む光る曲線となった。壁の模様は浮遊し、理解不能な記号や未知の顔へと変化した。隊員たちは多くが祈りを捧げ、この奇妙な光る幻影に心を奪われた恐怖を払いのけることを願った。
